value_metric: a fixture + contract-test harness that catches a government-site template change in CI (field drift, lost attachment, or broken pagination) instead of silently mis-fetching after go-live -- the safety net that lets the A0 official adapters (T034+) be trusted

cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.human_maintenance: offline fixtures + contract tests; when a real official site legitimately changes its template, re-capture the fixture and update the golden JSON, then the contract passes again
